active_blockers.description: Wishlist/community pins still use local prototype storage for most flows. Real cross-device sharing requires Supabase persistence for wishlist, public_places, and community_reviews.
Automated checks can generate OAuth URLs and verify callback code paths, but a real Google login requires an interactive browser/account test.
The operator account must be promoted to users.role='admin' before /admin is usable by the owner.

completed_critical_fixes.description: Supabase schema is applied, migrations are tracked, and advisors report no issues.
Added guarded /admin dashboard with logs, users, groups, stats, and system config management.
Updated Gemini model id to gemini-3-flash-preview and verified a live Gemini smoke response.
Kakao search results now appear as temporary map markers and can open the report/save modal.
Group ensure/join APIs now use typed explicit queries and clearer error paths; join stores remoteGroupId and inviteUrl in the local session.
Applied QA hardening: admin lockout protection, group capacity advisory lock, owner-only groups update RLS, and Gemini model env override.

pending_warnings: Supabase Auth Google provider and redirect allowlist still need visual dashboard confirmation for production and local origins.
Kakao Developers domain settings and Map API enablement still need visual dashboard confirmation.
Docker is unavailable, so database types were manually synchronized instead of generated by Supabase CLI.
SUPABASE_DB_URL in .env.local is transaction pooler port 6543; use the same URL with port 5432 for Supabase CLI lint/advisors.
A human should complete the real Google login browser flow and then test /api/groups/ensure, invite accept, /admin, /app/ai, and /api/capture from the browser session.
